title: Cirrus: Initial implementation support for GCP VMs

comments.body: @lsm5 you may want to rebase your PR on this one (or after it merges).  Though don't actually create any GCP VM tasks yet, I'm still waiting on approvals and other backend bureaucratic stuffs.
@cevich great, will do. and LGTM. Just that I hit `Update Branch` which probably introduced a merge commit. That was a bad idea. Mind rebasing and force pushing please?
still needs a rebase likely, I still see `This branch is out-of-date with the base branch`.
I did rebase,. but I see that too...I think github hasn't caught up to reality yet.
huh...my remote wasn't pulling down the *actual* master HEAD for some reason.  I rebased onto the SHA and that worked :man_shrugging:
